symbols: angel kneeling — divine messenger delivering God's invitation
Mary — the chosen vessel of the Incarnation
description: A Baroque Annunciation by Luca Giordano showing Gabriel approaching Mary with dynamic heavenly imagery above, likely including cherubs and divine light in Giordano's characteristic rapid, luminous style.
theological_description: The Annunciation (LUK.1.26-38) inaugurates the Incarnation. Gabriel announces: 'you will conceive and bear a son, and you shall call his name Jesus' (LUK.1.31). Mary's fiat — 'let it be to me according to your word' (LUK.1.38) — opens the door for God to enter the world as man.
